ground_truth_summary: JWT_EXPIRY changed from 3600 to 60 seconds in auth-svc deployment v2.4.1, causing token expiry failures. Rollback to v2.4.0 resolved the issue.
resolution: Rollback deployment v2.4.1 to v2.4.0 and revert JWT_EXPIRY to 3600 seconds

ground_truth_summary: JWT_EXPIRY configuration change in auth-svc caused authentication token failures across dependent services.
resolution: Revert JWT_EXPIRY configuration and restart affected services

ground_truth_summary: New api-svc deployment introduced a database connection leak causing pool exhaustion and 500 errors.
resolution: Rollback api-svc deployment and fix connection leak

ground_truth_summary: Redis maxmemory-policy changed from allkeys-lru to noeviction, blocking writes and causing cache failures.
resolution: Revert maxmemory-policy to allkeys-lru in Redis config

ground_truth_summary: monitoring-agent deployment v2.4.1 consumed excessive memory causing Kubernetes to evict pods across nodes.
resolution: Rollback monitoring-agent to previous version and add resource limits

ground_truth_summary: Long-running transaction on primary database blocked replication, causing read replica lag over 30 seconds.
resolution: Kill long-running transaction and tune query timeout settings

ground_truth_summary: Load balancer timeout changed from 30s to 1s, causing api-gateway to timeout on all upstream requests.
resolution: Restore LB_TIMEOUT to 30s in load balancer configuration

ground_truth_summary: SSL certificate for the CDN endpoint expired causing HTTPS handshake failures for all external traffic.
resolution: Renew SSL certificate and deploy to CDN endpoints

ground_truth_summary: event-processor deployment v1.3.0 introduced a slow message deserialization bug causing Kafka consumer lag.
resolution: Rollback event-processor to v1.2.0 and fix deserialization code

ground_truth_summary: Scheduler used local timezone instead of UTC causing batch jobs to run at wrong times during DST transition.
resolution: Fix scheduler to use UTC and reschedule missed batch jobs

ground_truth_summary: payment-svc deployment v3.2.0 introduced a memory leak in session handling causing OOM crashes.
resolution: Rollback payment-svc to v3.1.0 and fix session cleanup code

ground_truth_summary: DNS nameserver addresses were changed to incorrect IPs causing resolution failures across all services.
resolution: Restore correct nameserver addresses in DNS configuration

ground_truth_summary: API gateway rate limit changed from 10000 RPM to 10 RPM, throttling all legitimate traffic.
resolution: Restore RATE_LIMIT_RPM to 10000 in api-gateway config

ground_truth_summary: Log rotation was disabled causing log files to fill disk on all service nodes within 48 hours.
resolution: Re-enable log rotation and purge old log files immediately

ground_truth_summary: Circuit breaker threshold changed from 50% to 2% error rate, causing breaker to open on any single error.
resolution: Restore CB_THRESHOLD to 50% in api-gateway circuit breaker config

ground_truth_summary: Elasticsearch shard allocation failed after node removal leaving cluster in red status with unassigned shards.
resolution: Re-add node or reroute unassigned shards using cluster reroute API

ground_truth_summary: Database migration dropped index on users.email column causing full table scans on every auth request.
resolution: Recreate index on users.email and monitor query performance

ground_truth_summary: Payment gateway API deprecated TLS 1.0 and payment-svc was not upgraded to TLS 1.2 causing connection rejections.
resolution: Upgrade payment-svc TLS config to use TLS 1.2 minimum

ground_truth_summary: CDN cache key did not include Authorization header, causing authenticated responses to be served to unauthenticated users.
resolution: Update CDN cache key rules to vary on Authorization header

ground_truth_summary: Istio VirtualService misconfiguration set retry attempts to 10 with no timeout causing cascading retry storms.
resolution: Fix Istio VirtualService to limit retries to 3 with 5s timeout

ground_truth_summary: IAM policy update removed GetSecretValue permission from service role, blocking all secret access.
resolution: Re-add GetSecretValue permission to the service IAM role

ground_truth_summary: New GraphQL resolver introduced N+1 query pattern causing database overload on complex queries.
resolution: Add DataLoader batching to the GraphQL resolver to eliminate N+1 pattern

ground_truth_summary: S3 bucket policy was changed to private, blocking all application read/write operations.
resolution: Restore S3 bucket policy to allow service principal access

ground_truth_summary: Load balancer idle timeout set to 30s caused WebSocket connections to be dropped during low-activity periods.
resolution: Increase load balancer idle timeout to 3600s for WebSocket support

ground_truth_summary: Feature flag cache in Redis was fully evicted causing feature flag service to fall back to fail-closed state.
resolution: Increase Redis maxmemory and set noeviction policy for feature flag keyspace

ground_truth_summary: SMTP credentials were rotated but notification-svc was not updated, causing email delivery failures.
resolution: Update SMTP_PASSWORD secret in notification-svc environment and restart

ground_truth_summary: Elasticsearch index replication lag caused search results to be 2 hours stale after primary node restart.
resolution: Force index sync and monitor replication lag until below 5 seconds

ground_truth_summary: Billing service calculated monthly totals using server local time instead of UTC causing incorrect charges.
resolution: Fix billing-svc to use UTC for all date calculations and reprocess affected invoices

ground_truth_summary: Legacy API v1 endpoint was shut down but 3 internal services still depended on it causing failures.
resolution: Restore API v1 endpoint temporarily and migrate dependent services to v2

ground_truth_summary: gRPC max message size not updated after payload grew, causing streaming RPC calls to fail silently.
resolution: Increase grpc.max_receive_message_length to 32MB in service config

ground_truth_summary: Kubernetes metrics-server crashed causing HPA autoscaler to have no CPU data and not scale out under load.
resolution: Restart metrics-server pod and verify HPA resumes normal scaling

ground_truth_summary: OAuth client secret expired causing all token refresh attempts to fail with 401 Unauthorized.
resolution: Rotate OAuth client secret and update in auth-svc secrets manager

ground_truth_summary: New ORM version changed lock acquisition order causing deadlocks between concurrent transactions.
resolution: Rollback ORM version and add deadlock detection with retry logic

ground_truth_summary: Container registry access token expired causing all pod restarts to fail with ImagePullBackOff errors.
resolution: Refresh registry credentials secret and trigger pod restarts

ground_truth_summary: Consumer thread pool exhausted after upstream service slowdown, causing RabbitMQ queue backlog to grow.
resolution: Scale consumer-svc replicas and increase thread pool size

ground_truth_summary: All backend pods for the reporting service crashed due to OOM, causing ingress to return 502 Bad Gateway.
resolution: Restart reporting-svc pods and increase memory limits

ground_truth_summary: Concurrent audit log writers without mutex lock caused log file corruption during high-traffic periods.
resolution: Add write mutex to audit logger and rebuild corrupted log files

ground_truth_summary: API key rotation script deleted old keys before new keys were propagated, causing 401 errors during transition.
resolution: Implement grace period for old keys during rotation and re-issue affected client keys

ground_truth_summary: Health check timeout reduced to 100ms caused healthy services to be marked unhealthy and removed from load balancer pool.
resolution: Restore health check timeout to 2000ms and re-add healthy services to pool

ground_truth_summary: Kubernetes NetworkPolicy change blocked Prometheus from scraping metrics endpoints on port 9090.
resolution: Update NetworkPolicy to allow ingress from Prometheus namespace on port 9090

ground_truth_summary: Backup destination storage quota was exceeded causing backup jobs to fail silently without alerting.
resolution: Increase storage quota, purge old backups, and add quota alerts
